name: ABDC percentile ranges (editable) → value cutoffs
description: Derives CiteScore/SNIP/SJR value cutoffs from the ABDC-matched set using editable percentile bands (UL only). Applies those cutoffs to any Scopus journal to compute ABDC-equivalent labels.
display_note: Editable ABDC reference percentiles are shown below.

name: Quartiles → A*/A/B/C (default)
description: Maps Scopus quartiles to A*/A/B/C: Q1=A*, Q2=A, Q3=B, Q4=C. Uses scopus_quartile.
display_note: Scopus quartile mapping used: Q1=A*, Q2=A, Q3=B, Q4=C.

name: Percentiles: Top10=A*, 90–70=A, 70–50=B, <50=C
description: Maps CiteScore percentile to A*/A/B/C using bands: [90,100]=A*, [70,90)=A, [50,70)=B, [0,50)=C. Uses citescore_percentile.
